ADDITIONAL DETAILS: Had a tree removed in Novemebr and Stump gring done a week or so later.  Need the area where stump was leveled , cleaned up and re-seeded.

Tore our most of my front yard landsaping last summer.  Redoing the entire exterior of my home looking t have the front re-landscaped when the house is completed in June/July.

Looking to get estimates on all three projects now so I can get the first 2 done before the house project begins.

Thanks

LEAD NOTES: Aurora Schools Foundation Donation Request -The Aurora Schools Foundation is gearing up for our annual fundraiser, this year themed as, Sip, Savor & Support, on Saturday, March 14, 2026 — a night of food, wine, bourbon, and community, all in support of education.
Each year proceeds from our online auction fund innovative teacher grants that bring creativity and opportunity into Aurora classrooms — projects that fall outside the regular school budget but make a lasting difference for students.
This year, we’re reaching out to local businesses and community members like you to ask for donated items or experiences that we can feature in our auction.
We’re especially looking for:
 Unique experiences or services; Sporting event or concert tickets; Vacation homes or rental properties; Restaurant gift certificates; & Other items that would inspire interest or spark friendly bidding
Every donated item helps us raise the funds enrich student learning, empower teachers & bring innovative ideas to life throughout our schools.
In-Kind Sponsorship Opportunity:
If the value of your donation meets one of our corporate sponsorship levels, your organization will receive in-kind corporate sponsor recognition — including name placement in event materials and year-round acknowledgment through ASF.
Thank you for helping us invest in Aurora’s students, teachers, and future. We can’t wait to celebrate with you at Sip, Savor & Support 2026!
 (BEST TIME TO REACH THEM: Afternoon - LEAD SOURCE: Yard Sign)

ADDITIONAL DETAILS: Hi,
I hope this message finds you well.

I’m reaching out because I know how important it is for your clients to have flexible payment options for their home improvement projects — and for you to close more sales without the hassle of delayed payments.

That’s why I’d like to introduce you to Regions home improvement financing program, a trusted leader in home improvement financing. With Regions simple, unsecured loans, your customers can get the projects they want now — and pay over time with convenient terms.

Here’s how Regions financing program can benefit your business:
? Increase your average project size — customers can say “yes” to upgrades.
? Get paid upfront — no waiting or collections hassles.
? Offer fast, easy applications with instant credit decisions.
? Stand out from the competition by offering trusted financing solutions.

Want to learn more?
Here is our partner Regions offer link - https://enerbank.pxf.io/c/6320290/2844105/16672
Please fill out the form and discuss everything directly with our partner (Regions) to figure out finance solutions for your clients and grow your business 2X.

Looking forward to helping you grow your business!

LEAD NOTES: Hi , I'm Jessica, your Account Success Manager.

I've built a custom welcome page for your business that outlines how our secondary customer financing program helps contractors close more projects - with absolutely no per-loan fees, extra work, or risk on your end.

Here are 5 reasons contractors add this option:

     1- Zero merchant fees - eliminate the 5-15% charged by traditional programs
     2- FICO approvals as low as 500 - a second look for homeowners declined elsewhere
     3- No switching required - integrates with your existing financing options
     4- No added work for your team - no training or process changes
     5- Zero risk to your business - no recourse or liability

Feel free to view your business's personalized financing welcome page here:
Chapin Landscapes LLC Custom Welcome Page 
hrdealerfinancing.com/?a=Chapin-Landscapes-LLC

Glad to answer any questions once you've had a chance to review.

Best,
Jessica Snyder 
HelloRates Customer Financing 
Partner Success Team 
Trusted by 13,000+ Contractors for Their Prime & Subprime Customers
9 (BEST TIME TO REACH THEM: Afternoon - LEAD SOURCE: Referral)

LEAD NOTES: Hey,

I wanted to follow up on my previous message as I was just in touch with one of our interested buyers who are actively in the market for a company like yours. They have expressed strong interest, and I believe this could be a great opportunity for us to discuss further.
 
Would you be open to having a quick conversation?
 
If so, what is the best number to contact you?
 
Looking forward to your response. (BEST TIME TO REACH THEM: Morning - LEAD SOURCE: Internet search)

LEAD NOTES: Hi, would you be interested in partnering with my company, Lighting Squad, LLC. and Prospectr Marketing, Inc. to start a holiday and permanent lighting business (100% owned by you) in your market? If you are interested in learning more I can send more information, or we could schedule a 15 minute call to discuss the opportunity. 


We started this business because our parent company Prospectr Marketing, Inc. generates leads for 225+ customers in commercial and residential exterior maintenance and janitorial services. We work with a company in Seattle providing window washing services and other exterior maintenance services and they also hired us to market their holiday lighting business.
 

We saw that lighting  business grow from $60,000 in year 1 to $1mil by year 5. They taught us the model they used and we having provided the marketing support had learned how to generate the demand needed to grow the lighting business.
 

I hope you’ll call me with any questions or concerns as I would like to do this with you!
 

The beautiful thing about this business is that it is a great door opener in that my marketing typically averages 1 lead for every 2,500 impressions, in this business we averaged one lead for every 600 impressions and the customers are already asking for other services, so it is a useful magnet to then upsell customers into your other service offerings.
 

With best,

Jeremy Belisle
Partner / VP
Lighting Partners, Inc
jeremy@uslightingpartnersllc.com

Respond with stop to optout. (BEST TIME TO REACH THEM: Afternoon - LEAD SOURCE: Referral)

LEAD NOTES: Dear CEO/Founder,

I hope this message finds you well.

I’m reaching out from the Construction Management Institute USA (CMI USA) to introduce a range of professional development opportunities tailored to the construction industry.

All of our courses are industry-focused, built around real-world examples and case studies, and delivered by experienced lecturers from the U.S. construction sector. Our programs are designed to equip your team with the latest skills and knowledge to succeed in today’s competitive environment.

Based on industry demand in the U.S., the most sought-after training programs include:
11.	Construction Project Management
12.	Cost Estimating & Cost Control
13.	Building Information Modelling (BIM) and Digital Tools 
14.	Construction Delay Analysis 
15.	Contract Management, Claims & Dispute Resolution 
16.	Project Scheduling (CPM, Primavera, MS Project) 
17.	Construction Change Proposals 
18.	Construction Safety & OSHA Compliance 
19.	Sustainable Construction & Green Building 
20.	Site Supervision & Leadership Development

Our training is available live online and face-to-face, making it accessible to teams across the United States, whether for individual upskilling or company-wide programs. Many organizations use our courses to:
•	Maximize income and reduce project risks.
•	Strengthen compliance with safety and contract standards.
•	Protect themselves from losses.
We would be delighted to discuss how our courses can support your organization’s workforce development. Please let us know a convenient time for a Zoom meeting or phone call.

Thank you for your time, and we look forward to the opportunity to work with you.

Best regards,

Samantha Price
Communications Officer
Construction Management Institute of the USA 
99 Wall Street suite 944 
New York, NY 10005 
 (BEST TIME TO REACH THEM: Morning - LEAD SOURCE: Internet search)
